channel.title: BUT DID YOU WIN Blog
channel.description: Insights on paid media diagnosis, advertising efficiency, and business outcomes from an independent auditor.
channel.copyright: © 2026 BUT DID YOU WIN. All rights reserved.

item.title: 5 Signs Your Paid Media Accounts Need a Fresh Set of Eyes
item.description: Even well-managed paid media accounts accumulate inefficiencies over time. Here are five symptoms that suggest it's time for an independent evaluation.
item.author: Kay Inoue

item.title: Common Optimization Opportunities in Mature Paid Media Accounts
item.description: The hidden cost of wasted ad spend and common inefficiencies found in mature advertising accounts.
item.author: Kay Inoue

item.title: How Pricing Models Shape Paid Media Recommendations
item.description: Understanding how percentage-of-spend pricing creates conflicts of interest in paid media management.
item.author: Kay Inoue
